summary: Phase L Backend Testing Complete - All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend automated testing blocked by login authentication issue, but code review confirms all UI elements are implemented per spec.

integration_issues.issue: Login button click does not complete authentication in automated test environment. URL remains at /login after clicking 'SIGN IN TO CONTROL ROOM' button.
integration_issues.note: This appears to be a test environment issue, not a production bug. Manual testing recommended. All backend APIs are working correctly.

passed_tests: ✅ RCA trigger from long WO (duration 45 min exceeds 30 min threshold)
✅ RCA WO cannot complete without 5-Why submission (400 error)
✅ RCA submission validation (all 5 whys + root_cause + corrective_action required)
✅ RCA submission permission (403 for non-assigned tech, admin can submit)
✅ RCA edit after completion rejected (400 error)
✅ RCA lifecycle (tech complete -> PENDING_ADMIN_CLOSURE, tech close -> 403, admin close -> CLOSED)
✅ Short WO (10 min) does NOT trigger RCA
✅ Breakdown RCA trigger (downtime > 30 min triggers RCA WO)
✅ Technician analytics admin-only (403 for tech/operator, 200 for admin)
✅ Technician analytics filters (date_from, date_to, line, department, wo_type)
✅ Line runtime logging (POST /api/runtime-logs with line, fans out to machines)
✅ Line runtime validation (run_hours > calendar_hours -> 400, unknown line -> 404)
✅ Line runtime CSV import (line,date,run_hours format)
✅ AWS failure categories (failure_categories dict + dominant_category per machine)
✅ AWS category filter (?category=MECHANICAL returns only MECHANICAL machines)
✅ Frontend code review: RCA filter chip, RCA badge, RCA form button present in WorkOrders.jsx
✅ Frontend code review: RCA form page with progressive unlock, submit/complete buttons in RcaForm.jsx
✅ Frontend code review: Technician analytics section with admin-only rendering in Analytics.jsx
✅ Frontend code review: Line-based runtime logging in Runtime.jsx
✅ Frontend code review: Category filter chips and Failure Category column in AWSPage.jsx

success_percentage.frontend: Code review: 100% implementation complete. Automated UI testing: 0% (blocked by login issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: ✅ All Phase L backend features working correctly (15/15 tests passed). Frontend implementation is complete per code review - all required UI elements (RCA filters, RCA form, technician analytics, line runtime, AWS categories) are present in the codebase. Automated frontend testing was blocked by login authentication in test environment - recommend manual verification or investigation of login flow in automated testing context.
